main.node: 21. Wait For All Shots to Upload

nodes.name: Nanobana - Reference Image
nodes.notes: Replace URL and body params with actual Nanobana API spec

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: =A full body portrait of an avatar character wearing {{ $json.clothes }}. Background: {{ $json.background }}. The avatar should be clearly visible, centered, facing forward. High quality, Instagram-ready, cinematic lighting. {{ $json.concept }}

nodes.name: Kling - Generate Shot Image
nodes.notes: Adjust endpoint and body params per actual Kling API docs

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ $json.image_prompt }}. The avatar wears {{ $('Set Reference Image URL').item.json.clothes }}. Background: {{ $('Set Reference Image URL').item.json.background }}. Maintain exact face and body features from reference image. High quality, 9:16 aspect ratio, Instagram reel style.

nodes.name: Create Review Folder
nodes.notes: Create the photos_review folder in Drive before uploading

nodes.name: Phase 2 - Set Reel Number
nodes.notes: Edit this node to set the reel number you want to process

nodes.name: Kling - Image to Video (Placeholder)
nodes.notes: PLACEHOLDER - Update with correct Kling video API endpoint and params when ready

parameters.name: prompt
parameters.value: ={{ $json.name }} - cinematic camera motion, smooth, high quality Instagram reel style

nodes.name: FFMPEG Stitch (Placeholder)
nodes.notes: Replace with SSH Execute node pointing to your VPS. Run FFMPEG to stitch clips + song audio

nodes.name: Upload Final Video to Drive
nodes.notes: Connect output of FFMPEG node here once it produces actual binary data

nodes.name: 1. Google Sheets Trigger
nodes.notes: Triggers when a new row is added to your Reels sheet

nodes.name: 3. Download Song MP3
nodes.notes: Downloads the MP3 file from the Google Drive/direct link in the sheet

nodes.name: 4. Whisper - Transcribe Song
nodes.notes: Uses OpenAI Whisper to transcribe the song into English text

nodes.name: 6. Get Account Avatar URLs
nodes.notes: Reads from Avatar Mappings tab. Expects columns: Account Username, Avatar 1 URL, Avatar 2 URL, etc.

documentId.cachedResultName: Sample Sheet for auto video generation based on song

nodes.name: 8. Gemini - Full Concept + Shot Breakdown
nodes.notes: Single Gemini call: picks avatars, defines clothes/background, generates concept and all shot prompts

nodes.name: 11. Nanobana - Generate Reference Image
nodes.notes: IMPORTANT: Update URL and request body to match actual Nanobana API docs. This uses a guessed structure.

nodes.name: 13. Create Reel Folder in Drive
nodes.notes: Creates: Reel_{number} folder

nodes.name: 14. Create photos_review Subfolder
nodes.notes: Creates: Reel_{number}/photos_review/ subfolder

nodes.name: 16. Split Into Individual Shots
nodes.notes: Creates one item per shot for parallel/sequential processing

nodes.name: 17. fal.ai - Generate Shot Image
nodes.notes: Uses flux-pro/kontext for best character consistency. Runs once per shot.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "prompt": "{{ $json.image_generation_prompt }}. Maintain exact character appearance, face, and clothing from reference image. {{ $('15. Merge Folder ID + Context').item.json.clothes }}. Background: {{ $('15. Merge Folder ID + Context').item.json.background }}. 9:16 vertical aspect ratio, Instagram reel style, cinematic quality.",
  "image_url": "{{ $('15. Merge Folder ID + Context').item.json.referenceImageUrl }}",
  "image_size": "portrait_16_9",
  "num_images": 1,
  "guidance_scale": 3.5,
  "num_inference_steps": 28
}

nodes.name: 20. Upload Shot to Drive
nodes.notes: Files saved as: shot_1_opening_scene.png, shot_2_chorus.png etc.

nodes.name: 21. Wait For All Shots to Upload
nodes.notes: Waits until all shot images are uploaded before updating the sheet

nodes.name: 22. Update Sheet - Status: In Review
nodes.notes: Updates the reel row: Status = In Review, adds Drive folder link
